name: slash_popup
description: Type `/sear` into the chat input, press Enter to accept the highlighted suggestion (the popup's handle_key intercepts Enter when visible and routes to accept_slash, which replaces the input with `/search `). Validates the slash popup + filter + accept path end-to-end via the side-effect on the chat input. The popup itself is a wxPopupTransientWindow whose UIA visibility is unreliable, so we observe the input text instead. The slash item list comes from LocusFrame::set_slash_commands (built-in `reset/compact/save/settings/undo` + tool names from SlashCommandDispatcher::complete) -- `metrics` and other AgentCore-only slashes do NOT appear in the popup by design.
